_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
| Date | Event | Status | Workspace implication |
|---|---|---|---|
| 05 Oct 2021 | GRI Universal Standards (GRI 1, 2, 3) published | In force as of Oct 2021 | Baseline framework for any GRI-aligned reporting |
| 01 Jan 2023 | Revised Universal Standards effective for reporting | In force as of Jan 2023 | Any GRI report covering periods from 2023 onward uses GRI 1/2/3 2021 |
| 2016 | GRI 305 (Emissions), GRI 308 (Supplier Environmental Assessment) published | In force | GRI 308 is the mechanism by which clients may request environmental data from the workspace |
| 24 Jan 2024 | GRI 101: Biodiversity 2024 published | In force | Relevant to humanitarian and agricultural verticals; lower materiality for air freight forwarder |
| 26 Jun 2025 | GRI 102: Climate Change 2025 and GRI 103: Energy 2025 published | In force as of Jun 2025 | Most current standards on topics of highest materiality to freight operations; full text not yet reviewed |
| 26 Jun 2025 | Full set of GRI Standards updated | In force as of Jun 2025 | Download and review recommended |
| 01 Jan 2026 | GRI 11 (Oil & Gas), GRI 13 (Agriculture), GRI 14 (Mining) Sector Standards v1.1 effective | In force as of Jan 2026 | Not directly applicable to freight forwarding; relevant only if workspace moves cargo for sector-specific clients whose reports reference these standards |

**Research gap:** No announced future milestone for a GRI Logistics or Transport Sector Standard has been confirmed from the available source. This timeline will be updated if a sector standard development project is identified.

*Source: GRI Standards English Language listing publication dates, Global Reporting Initiative. https://www.globalreporting.org/how-to-use-the-gri-standards/gri-standards-english-language/*

---
